name: The Secret of Gillwood
short_description: The gods don´t hear the prayers of Gillwood, so it’s now up to you to find out why! The Secret of Gillwood is an single player game set in a dark and mysterious linear world. The player takes control over the most faithful Guardian of the gods.
detailed_description:
The gods don't hear the prayers of Gillwood, so it’s now up to you to find out why!

The Secret Of Gillwood

The Secret of Gillwood is a single player game set in a dark and mysterious linear world. The player takes control of the most faithful Guardian of the gods.

Your mission is to help the gods of Gillwood, to uncover the mystery that suddenly silenced the town.

Features

  • Exploration
  • Analysis
  • Puzzles

When the player enters the world of Gillwood, it’s important to explore the surroundings. Exploration helps the player to progress through the games content by finding the right place.
When the player has explored and found the point of interest, it’s time to find where the puzzle starts.
The puzzles main parts will have the player jumping, completing time gated events and have good timing!
